title: Online3R: Online Learning for Consistent Sequential Reconstruction Based on Geometry Foundation Model
author: Shunkai Zhou, Zike Yan, Fei Xue, Dong Wu, <mark>Yuchen Deng</mark>, Hongbin Zha<sup>†</sup>
publication: IEEE/CVF Conf. on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2026
summary: We improve accuracy and reduce drift by combining local and global geometric consistency losses.

title: ProCap: Projection-Aware Captioning for Spatial Augmented Reality
author: Zimo Cao<sup>*</sup>, <mark>Yuchen Deng<sup>*</sup></mark>, Haibin Ling, Bingyao Huang<sup>†</sup>
publication: IEEE Conf. on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (IEEE VR), 2026
summary: We present RGBP (RGB + Projections), the first large-scale SAR semantic benchmark dataset (Over 180,000 pairs).

title: LAPIG: Language Guided Projector Image Generation with Surface Adaptation and Stylization
author: <mark>Yuchen Deng</mark>, Haibin Ling, Bingyao Huang<sup>†</sup>
publication:
IEEE Trans. on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), 2025
also in IEEE Conf. on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (IEEE VR)
summary: We first design projection consistency and color saturation metrics for surface adaptation quality.
